reviews.comment:
Mmm más o menos muy poca comida para tantos turistas en éste finde largo
Atención moderada correcta.
Tenían muchos sandwich 🥪  de hace 1 mes atrás y la verdad nada barato para que no éste fresco. Los baños limpios y el agua caliente es gratarola,  un saludo 🖐

(Translated by Google)
Hmm, more or less, very little food for so many tourists this long weekend.
Service was moderately adequate.
They had a lot of sandwiches 🥪 that were a month old, and honestly, they weren't cheap considering they weren't fresh. The bathrooms were clean, and the hot water was free. Cheers! 🖐
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1X29iNEtBEAE

reviews.comment:
Como todas las estaciones del ACA, buena atencion, pulcritud en los baños, vale la pena hacer un alto en ellas, ademas del servicio de auxilio, por algo llevo tantos años de socio!!

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA stations, the service is good, the restrooms are clean, and it's worth stopping there. Plus, the roadside assistance is great; there's a reason I've been a member for so many years!
